use_cases: Displaying user profile images in card layouts
Showing team member avatars in organizational charts
Representing users in comment sections or chat interfaces
Creating avatar placeholders with fallback initials
ai_summary: A reusable Avatar component built with Radix UI primitives and Tailwind CSS, featuring Image and Fallback sub-components for graceful handling of missing images. Designed for profile display within card layouts, supporting circular avatars with responsive sizing and customizable styling.
